prompt: Order these US history events from earliest to latest

events.title: Louisiana Purchase
events.fact: 1803 — US buys territory from France for $15 million

events.title: Golden Gate Bridge opens
events.fact: 1937 — suspension bridge connects SF to Marin County

events.title: Mount Rushmore complete
events.fact: 1941 — four presidential faces carved in SD

events.title: I Have a Dream speech
events.fact: 1963 — MLK Jr. delivers address at Lincoln Memorial
